title: Citrus Crumble Chicken Skivers
description: A light and citrusy Norwegian-inspired dish featuring gluten-free-friendly chicken legs topped with a crumbly citrus crust.

ingredients.name: Freshly Squeezed Citrus Juice (e.g. Orange, Lemon)

instructions: Season chicken legs with salt and pepper. Pat dry.
In a bowl, mix together citrus zest, juice, gluten-free flour, cornstarch, and a pinch of salt.
Apply the mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken pieces, ensuring they are well coated on all sides.
Drizzle olive oil over chicken legs to coat.
Place chicken in an oven-safe dish. Broil for 5 minutes until golden brown.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for another 20-25 minutes or until juices run clear and internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Serve hot with a side of fresh green herbs if desired.
